title: rangium koreanum
intro: Rangium koreanum is a type of plant, specifically a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae, commonly known as the carrot or parsley family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Rangium koreanum include its potential to reduce stress, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Rangium koreanum can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
